# Agents

## CIAnalyze

Analyzes the codebase, updates README and documentation, runs linting/testing/CI/git hooks, resolves all issues, and commits a detailed PR to GitHub.

**Assigned to:** Codebase And Update Readme And Documentation. 

Run Linting, Testing, Ci, And Git Hooks. Do Not Skip Or Bypass Any Steps.

Resolve All Issues And Errors.

Use Best Practices. Keep Code Simple And Dry.

Git Commit And Push New Pr To Github, Be Detailed With Comments Of Changes
